settings.title: settings
settings.theme_desc: Pick a palette. Saved to this browser's local storage; takes effect immediately and persists across reloads.
settings.cadence_desc: How often the webapp talks to your local node. Aggressive = snappier leaderboard, more node traffic. Easy = lighter, but the contract prunes you after 60 s of silence so don't go past that.
settings.auto_mission_desc: Pause the auto-loop when HP drops below this fraction of your maximum. 0% keeps the old behaviour — only stop at 0 HP. Higher values save you from losing HP/forms/consumables to a string of bad rolls.
settings.publish_checkbox: publish immediately after a mission (in addition to the periodic heartbeat)
settings.identity_body: Export the Ed25519 seed to move identity to another node, or wipe inventory back to a fresh-character state.
settings.identity_body_tail: — pubkey survives but every counter, item, skill, and ending goes to zero.
settings.advanced_desc: Lower-traffic / privacy / debug switches. Defaults are fine for most players.
settings.hide_stale: hide stale players from leaderboard (last seen > 30 s ago)
settings.ws_override: WS URL override (empty = use ?ws= or default; takes effect after page reload):
settings.reset_ui_prefs_desc: Clears theme + cadence + auto-pause + advanced toggles and reloads the page. Doesn't touch your inventory — that lives on the node.
settings.where_state_body: Local view is just a cache of what lives on the node. Reload the page — identity and inventory come straight back from the delegate. To actually delete your save, wipe `~/.config/freenet/secrets/local/<delegate-key>/` on the node.
settings.seed_reveal_warn: Copy this once. Anyone with these bytes can impersonate you on the contract.
stat.name: Name
col.name: name
term.pubkey_hidden: pubkey hidden (toggle in advanced to reveal)
onb.body_welcome_1: Your hero, inventory, and identity live on the local Freenet node — not in this browser tab. Clearing your cookies, switching browsers, or reloading the page won't lose anything.
onb.body_welcome_2: If the node ever rebuilds, you can back up your seed from Settings → Backup & Migration.
onb.body_loop_1: Click Run Mission on the Farm tab. Each mission is a chain of up to 5 encounters — wins drop gear, potions, and fireballs at fixed cadences. Lose to a non-mundane enemy and you'll transform into them, permanently.
onb.body_loop_2: Every form you wear leaves a permanent skill — the prestige loop.
onb.body_auto_1: Toggle auto: on to let the hero fight on its own. Close the tab and come back later — the delegate simulates the missions you missed (up to ~1 hour at a time) and shows a summary when you return.
onb.body_auto_2: Set an HP-pause threshold in Settings if you'd rather not get auto-defeated.
onb.body_tabs_1: 🗺 World Map switches biomes once you out-level the current one. 🛒 Shop buys gear and potions, sells stash, forges duplicates, and trades wheat for gold. ⚙ Settings has themes, sync cadence, identity backup, and advanced toggles.
onb.body_tabs_2: Click ❔ Help any time for the full reference.
tutorial.body_1: Click Run Mission to fight the area's enemy. Every 5 wins drop gear (manage at the Shop tab), every 13 wins drop a potion, every 19 a fireball.
tutorial.body_2: Take damage in combat? HP regenerates over time, or use a potion to heal instantly. Pick a different battlefield from the World Map when you out-level the current one.
battle.opening_turn: (opening turn — combatants are sizing each other up)
battle.no_encounters: no encounters yet — Run Mission to fight
battle.potion_queued: potion queued — applies on next turn
battle.fireball_queued: fireball queued — applies on next turn
mailbox.empty: (no messages yet — click the button above to round-trip a chat)
catchup.clears_hint: (Banner clears when you run a mission.)
catchup.newer_build_desc: A newer build is live — no detailed changelog this time.
guilds.panel_desc: Cooperative groups — early scaffolding. Create one, others can join by id. Each player is in at most one guild; leaders auto-handoff on leave.
guilds.contract_missing_tail: (extension WIP) or override the keys in
shop.stash_desc: items grouped by slot — equip to wear, sell back to the merchant for tier-priced gold
shop.buy_gear_desc: pre-rolled equipment at the smithy. each click of Buy adds one piece of the requested slot+tier to your stash. legendary (T4) only via forge or drop.
shop.sage_desc: the Sage trades permanent skill lore for essence. Veteran/Champion still come from level milestones — those aren't for sale.
shop.farm_desc: safe non-combat income. each Work click yields +1 wheat; the merchant pays 1 gold per 10 wheat.
shop.farm_desc_passive: your Estate Farmhand workers now produce wheat passively — the merchant still buys it at 1 gold per 10.
tip.fight_in_progress: fight in progress — wait for the current battle to end
tip.auto_toggle_mid_fight: auto toggle still works during a fight — the new setting takes effect once the current battle ends
tip.auto_equip_best: walk every slot and equip the highest stat-sum piece you own
tip.auto_equip_nothing: nothing in the stash beats what you're already wearing — drop some loot or change form first
tip.estate_blocks_combat: Estate is active — pause it from the Estate panel to fight
tip.potion_queue: queue: heal to full on the next combat turn
tip.fireball_queue: queue: bonus damage on the next combat turn
tip.disband_leader: leader-only: delete the guild for everyone
tip.form_already_active: you are already in this form
help.loop_p1: Click Run Mission on the Farm tab to start a chain of up to 5 encounters against the current area's enemies. Combat is tick-based: one turn fires every 700ms, and you can queue Use Potion or Use Fireball mid-fight to react to a bad streak. Each win grants gold, essence, XP, and chips the shared World Boss. Lose, and you transform into the enemy that beat you.
help.loop_p2: Toggle auto: on and the node-side delegate keeps running missions even after you close the tab. You'll return to a while you were away banner summing up what happened (capped at ~1 hour of catch-up). Auto pauses when HP drops below the threshold you pick in Settings → auto-mission.
help.stats_p1: Your Level comes from cumulative XP. XP per level rises 1.5× each step (100, 150, 225, 337, …). Base stats are static per level: HP = 20 + lvl×5, Attack = 5 + lvl×2, Defence = 5 + lvl×2. Equipment, form, and skills add on top; nothing else (no gold/essence bleed-through).
help.stats_p2: HP depletes in combat and regenerates over time (full regen in 180s of real time). Use a Potion to instantly fill it.
help.forms_p1: Losing a combat to a non-mundane enemy permanently transforms you into that monster. Each form has its own equipped-slot mask: a Slime can only wear Helm + Ring, a Cat keeps Helm/Cloak/Boots/Ring, etc. Stats shift to match the form. Every form you've touched leaves a permanent Skill — even after you change back to Human, those bonuses carry. This is the prestige loop.
help.forms_p2: Forms also drive Estate affinity: while you're in a given form, your workers in matching tiers produce more, while non-matching tiers produce less. Horse buffs Farmhand + Forager, Dragon buffs Trader + Sage, Cat buffs Forager + Sage, Slime gives a flat +30% across the board, Human is neutral. The Shop tab has a paid Forms section so you can pick a shape directly without waiting for a defeat — Human is the cheap reset, the other four are a strategic commitment.
help.tabs_list: 🛡 Farm — your hero, the live combat scene (HP bars, queue-action buttons), plot, World Boss, raw resources.
🗺 World Map — switch farming areas. Higher areas have a level gate but pay more (or differently — Forest is essence-rich, Mountain is gold-rich, Boss's Lair is damage-heavy).
🛒 Shop — buy potions/fireballs, buy pre-rolled gear by slot+tier, sell stash items, forge 3-of-a-kind into the next tier, and Work the Farm (wheat → gold at 10:1).
⚔ Guilds — create or join a cooperative group. Membership is exclusive (one pubkey, one guild); leader auto-passes when they leave.
🏆 Achievements — milestones, skills you've unlocked, forms you've been, World Boss progress, leaderboard.
⚙ Settings — themes, sync cadence, auto-mission HP threshold, identity export / progress reset, advanced toggles + mailbox D2D test + debug overlay.
help.shop_p1: Gear is grouped by 8 slots × 4 tiers. Tiers 1-3 are buyable (100g/250g/600g); Tier 4 (Legendary) only drops or forges. Forge needs 3 copies of one item + tier-scaled essence to combine into a single piece of the next tier — your duplicates aren't trash, they're future legendaries.
help.shop_p2: Auto-Equip Best walks every form-allowed slot and equips the highest stat-sum unequipped piece you own.
help.consumables_p1: Potions (cost 50g) heal your HP to full. Fireballs (cost 200g) deal 50 flat damage to the shared World Boss. Drop rates: a potion every 13 wins, a fireball every 19.
help.world_boss_p1: The World Boss has 500 HP in era 0, shared across every player connected to the contract. Each win contributes 1× to area-dependent the base. Once cumulative damage exceeds the era's HP, the boss respawns in the next era — bigger. Era scaling makes the gauge keep moving once dozens of players have chipped at it forever.
help.delegate_p1: Everything that matters lives on your Freenet node, not in this browser tab. The delegate stores your Ed25519 identity, your inventory, every gear piece, every skill, your XP, your wheat, your shop counter, and your achievements — plus the active battle state so closing the tab pauses (not aborts) a fight. The browser is just a thin view.
help.delegate_p2: To move identity to another node, use Settings → Export seed — it returns the 32-byte secret key; copy it once, paste on the new node. Reset progress wipes the inventory (gold, gear, skills, achievements) but keeps the pubkey — leaderboards still recognize you. To actually destroy the identity, wipe `~/.config/freenet/secrets/local/<delegate-key>/`.
help.guilds_p1: The Guilds tab is the first cross-player interaction beyond the leaderboard: cooperative groups, one pubkey per guild, 50 members per guild. Create a new one or join existing — leader auto-handoff on leave. Gameplay layers (shared boss, member contributions) come later.
help.guilds_p2: The Mailbox section in Settings → Advanced is the signed-log substrate for player-to-player messaging — gifts, invites, trade offers will plug in on top. Send a self-test message to verify the round-trip is working.
help.estate_p1: Estate is the long-game income loop on the Farm tab. Hire workers in four tiers — Farmhand (wheat), Forager (more wheat), Trader (gold), Sage (essence) — each with a 1.07ⁿ price curve. Workers accrue passively while Estate is your selected idle action, capped at ~1 hour of catchup. Running Estate pauses auto-mission and blocks Run Mission: you pick what to be doing right now, the strategic axis is which idle loop to commit to.
help.estate_p2: Form affinity stacks on top: the active Form buffs or penalises specific tiers (see Forms above). Legacy multipliers, once you start collecting stars, also compound multiplicatively. The Estate panel itself shows the live affinity per row so you can read the current bonus at a glance.
help.legacy_p1: Legacy is the personal-prestige loop, surfaced in Settings → Legacy once you've earned your first star. You get one star every 5 levels (idempotent — the milestone watermark prevents re-grinding from zero after an Ascend). Spend stars on permanent multipliers (Hero Attack, Estate Yield, Mission Gold); cost curve doubles each level. Ascend is the optional soft-reset that wipes gold, gear, Estate, and the active battle while keeping stars, level, mission count, skills, and achievements — opt-in, never forced.
help.area_graph_p1: World Map is a graph, not a list — areas unlock if you meet the level requirement AND have the clear-count in any one predecessor. Branches off Forest Road (Deep Forest, Eastern paths) and Mountain Pass (Snowfields) let you choose specialisation routes that match your Form. Each card's '↑ Predecessor' label shows which upstream area unlocked it; the row layout grows downward as new zones ship.
forms_shop.desc: Reset your shape (Human is cheap) or commit gold to one of the other four forms. Each form also drives Estate affinity — Horse buffs Farmhand + Forager, Dragon buffs Trader + Sage, Cat buffs Forager + Sage, Slime gives a flat +30% across the board, Human is neutral. Direct purchase mirrors a defeat-induced transformation: the form is added to your visited set so its skill unlocks at the Sage.
activities.desc: Non-combat actions tied to the current zone. Picking one sets it as your idle action — auto-mission and Estate pause until you stop.
routine.desc: Auto-hire Estate workers up to the target count when gold permits. Capped at 50 hires per delegate tick so a fat catchup window can't drain the treasury.
insight.desc: Rare currency. Earned every 25 missions and by the Astral 'Decode sigils' activity. Spent on small, permanent buffs.
boss_attack.desc: Spend essence to chip the shared World Boss outside combat. Unlocks at mission_count ≥ 100, level ≥ 10, and at least one Estate worker.
boss_attack.locked: Locked — need 100 missions, level 10, and at least one Estate worker.
tokens.desc: Earned one per 500 personal boss damage. Spent on cosmetic perks today; gameplay perks (gear slot, second auto-mission preset) unlock as their plumbing lands.
mastery.intro: Permanent upgrades — bought once, kept forever. Legacy stars come from level milestones; Insight from missions and Astral activities; Tokens from personal boss damage. Routine targets and the World Boss Attack live here too.
wilds.desc: Late-game alternate map, procedurally generated from your plot seed. Names + enemy stat noise are unique to you; topology is fixed (8 nodes, two branches off the entrance, a confluence node). No World Boss contribution.
legacy.ascend_blurb: Soft-reset: keep stars, level, missions, skills. Wipe gold, gear, Estate.
legacy.ascend_confirm: Ascend — soft-reset run? Keeps stars, level, mission count, and skills. Wipes gold, gear, and Estate.
achievements.endings_intro: Final milestones. Unlocking one does not end the run — keep playing after any. Reachable in any order.
achievements.endings_empty: no endings yet — easiest is Pilgrim: visit all 5 forms
achievements.skills_intro: Skills are permanent passive bonuses. Each form you've taken leaves its mark — the trace doesn't reset on form change. Levels 10 and 20 grant the Veteran milestones.
achievements.skills_empty: no skills yet — lose to a non-Human to learn the first
achievements.list_empty: no badges yet — run a mission
fmt.estate_hint: Workers produce while Estate is the active idle action. Active form: {form_name}.
fmt.legacy_header: Stars: {stars}  ·  Ascensions: {ascensions}  ·  Next star at level {next_star_level}
fmt.stash_count.one: {n} item in stash — manage at the Shop tab
fmt.stash_count.other: {n} items in stash — manage at the Shop tab
fmt.boss_summary: Era {era} · {hp} / {max_hp} HP — {total_dmg} total damage from {players} players
fmt.no_spare_loot: no spare loot yet — gear drops every {every_n} missions
fmt.plot_backstory: You were abandoned in the {home} as a baby. Then one day, the {mac} disappeared! Surely the {vil} used the {mthd} to take it! Now you must journey to the {dest} to confront them.
fmt.mission_summary_no_boss: Mission in {area}: up to {encounters} encounters, ~{essence} essence per win, no World Boss contribution from this area — gold scales by enemy
fmt.mission_summary_with_boss: Mission in {area}: up to {encounters} encounters, ~{essence} essence + ~{mission_damage} boss damage per win — gold scales by enemy
fmt.last_publish: last publish: {age} · published gold {gold} · published damage {damage}
fmt.fireball_idle: deals {dmg} damage to the World Boss
fmt.sell_wheat_tooltip: convert all wheat to gold at 1:{ratio}
confirm.reset_progress:
Reset all inventory progress?

Your identity (pubkey) stays the same — leaderboards keep recognizing you — but every counter, item, skill, ending, and achievement goes back to zero.
confirm.reveal_seed:
Reveal your Ed25519 seed?

Anyone holding it can impersonate you. Only paste it into trusted backup storage; never into chat or screenshots.
confirm.disband_guild:
Disband "{guild_name}"?

This removes the guild entirely and every member loses their membership immediately. Only you (the current leader) can do this; if you change your mind, just don't click OK.
status.seed_exported: seed exported — copy and hide promptly
area_blurb.2: merchants pay generously; less essence (no boss)
area_blurb.3: heavy damage; the only area that hits the World Boss
area_blurb.4: dense thicket — more essence, tougher enemies
area_blurb.5: windswept plateaus — heavy gold, heavier losses
skill_blurb.100: You've been gooey once. The membrane carries over: +10 HP, +3 defence.
skill_blurb.110: Your reflexes remember the cat: +3 attack.
skill_blurb.120: Stray scales still cling to your skin: +4 attack, +3 defence.
skill_blurb.121: A horse's lung capacity outlasts the form: +12 HP, +2 defence.
skill_blurb.200: Ten levels of combat experience: +3 attack, +3 defence.
skill_blurb.201: Twenty levels in, you've earned the title: +5 atk, +5 def, +15 HP.
ending_blurb.1: Felled the Shadow Lord with your bare human hands. The kingdom remembers your name.
ending_blurb.2: You came as dragon and left as dragon, but the Shadow Lord's keep is your eyrie now.
ending_blurb.3: You've worn every shape on the map and decided each one was, technically, also you.
ending_blurb.4: Ten thousand bushels of wheat. The Shadow Lord still lurks somewhere, but the harvest is good.
fmt.achievement_reason.boss_damage: Deal {n} damage to the World Boss
chapter_body.0_first: Your father points east. "Be strong, and bring the boss down." The fields outside the village are quiet — for now. Run a mission to begin.
chapter_body.0: You're running errands at the edge of the fields. Each mission trickles gold and essence into the lockbox the delegate keeps for you on the node.
chapter_body.1: Word of your exploits has reached the next biome. The forest paths yield more essence, but the World Boss begins to stir as every player chips at its HP.
chapter_body.2: Merchants pay handsomely at the pass, and the loot scales. Other adventurers across the network are converging on the same foe — every hit is mirrored in the global HP gauge.
chapter_body.3: You've reached the inner sanctum. Damage-heavy work — every blow you land is mirrored in the World Boss HP gauge that every connected player sees in real time.
enemy_death.0: The elf bests you and leaves you bleeding by the road. You crawl home, bruised but still yourself.
enemy_death.1: The lawyer hands you a summons that flattens your ego. You hobble home, just as ordinary as ever.
enemy_death.2: The slime splits in two, and the new half lunges at you. You're absorbed, your body melts and oozes, and you become a green glowing blob of dumb slime.
enemy_death.10: The cat pounces and bites through your soul. As your vision fades, fur sprouts, whiskers, and a deep beastly wisdom for knocking things off tables.
enemy_death.11: The wraith's thorns make your veins glow green for a week, but you stagger home whole.
enemy_death.20: The golem flattens you into a pancake. You wake up at the trail head, dented but uncrystallised.
enemy_death.21: The war horse rears up, and as its hooves descend you feel your spine lengthen, arms fuse, dignity retreat. You're now a sturdy quadruped.
enemy_death.30: The dragon's fire bakes your bones into scales. When it's over, you don't remember how to be small. You are a dragon now.
enemy_death.31: The shadow lord drains you to a husk, but the skin holds. You return to the village, still human, still alive — barely.
